message: CI: add lint/format checks and tool install

files.patch:
@@ -11,5 +11,11 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Select Xcode
         run: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer
+      - name: Install tools
+        run: brew install swiftlint swiftformat pnpm
+      - name: Lint
+        run: swiftlint lint --config .swiftlint.yml
+      - name: Format check
+        run: swiftformat . --lint --config .swiftformat
       - name: Swift test
         run: swift test
